channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwe signs million-dollar schools partnership
item.description: ZIMBABWE has signed a multi-million-dollar deal to construct 1 000 schools across its 10 provinces. The Ministry of Primary and Sec­ondary Education... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscri #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Mining firm seeks to exhume 35 graves
item.description: Tapiwa Chirume A MINING firm, Cuprum Copper Zimbabwe (Pvt) Ltd, has applied to exhume and rebury 35 human remains in Gokwe North... item.title: Express Load truck overturns, family survives by whisker @bulawayo24
item.description: HARARE — A South African‐registered truck belonging to Express Load overturned early Sunday morning after the driver reportedly failed to negotiate a curve while speeding.The truck, which was carrying... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Brother In House Zimbabwe set for launch with 33 housemates @NewsDayZimbabwe
item.description: Brother In House Zimbabwe set for launch with 33 housemates #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: NewsDay Zimbabwe

item.title: Why do African countries change their names?
item.description: Why did the Gold Coast become Ghana, Rhodesia become Zimbabwe and Swaziland become Eswatini? African countries have usually changed their names when they entered a new political era, using new names to reflect independence, national identity and a break from colonial rule. (via The African Exponent) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The African Exponent

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Alexander Zverev to win Wimbledon again and move on from French Open meltdown
item.description: LONDON — Jannik Sinner is starting to make a habit of responding to adversity in Paris with titles at Wimbledon. The top-ranked Sinner beat Alexander Zverev 6-7 (7), 7-6 (2), 6-3, 6-4 Sunday for his second consecutive title at the All England Club after his German opponent appeared bothered by a knee issue following a [...] The post Jannik Sinner beats Alexander Zverev to win Wimbledon again and move on from French Open meltdown appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Government Endorses Namib Minerals’ Redwing Mine Restart as Gold Revival Gains Momentum
item.description: HARARE — The Zimbabwean Government has reaffirmed its support for the restart of Redwing Mine, describing the project as a strategically significant investment expected to strengthen gold production, create employment and contribute to broader economic growth. The endorsement follows a site inspection by Deputy Minister of Mines and Mining Development Fred Moyo, who visited the [...] The post Government Endorses Namib Minerals’ Redwing Mine Restart as Gold Revival Gains Momentum appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: UK based Zimbabwean community champion killed in M62 tragedy @bulawayo24
item.description: A devastating road tragedy has left the Zimbabwean community in the United Kingdom and beyond in mourning after a respected community champion, philanthropist and proud ambassador of Zimbabwean cultur... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Chivayo’s US$3.4 Million Timepiece Sparks Fresh Questions Over Wealth, Patronage and Accountability @wicknellchivayo
item.description: HARARE – Businessman Wicknell Chivayo has once again ignited public debate after appearing to wear what watch experts identify as the Jacob & Co. Billionaire Double Tourbillon Angel Cut, an ultra-exclusive luxury timepiece valued at approximately US$3.4 million. The watch, reportedly limited to just 18 pieces worldwide, is among the most expensive commercially available wristwatches [...] The post Chivayo’s US$3.4 Million Timepiece Sparks Fresh Questions Over Wealth, Patronage and Accountability appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Lindsey Graham, a close Trump ally and foreign policy hawk, dies after a brief illness
item.description: WASHINGTON — Sen. Lindsey Graham, one of President Donald Trump’s closest allies in Congress who traveled the globe to advocate for a more aggressive U.S. foreign policy, has died after a “brief and sudden illness,” his office said. He was 71. The statement posted on social media early Sunday said his family “appreciates prayers at [...] The post Lindsey Graham, a close Trump ally and foreign policy hawk, dies after a brief illness appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Mnangagwa says Presidential term extension wasn’t his idea @bulawayo24
item.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa says the constitutional amendments that extend Zimbabwe’s electoral cycle and introduce a new method of electing future presidents were not his personal initiative but the... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Lionel Messi’s World Cup scoring streak ends, but his assist sparks Argentina’s win over Switzerland
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo.— Lionel Messi had his World Cup scoring streak snapped by Switzerland on Saturday night, but the co-leader with France’s Kylian Mbappé in the race for the Golden Boot nevertheless found his way to leave his mark with an assist in Argentina’s 3-1 victory. The game was only in the 10th minute when [...] The post Lionel Messi’s World Cup scoring streak ends, but his assist sparks Argentina’s win over Switzerland appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Zimbabwe spies plotted to kill Ian Khama? @bulawayo24
item.description: Former Botswana president Ian Khama says he has received warnings from two independent sources alleging that there is a plot to kill him, claims he links to his outspoken criticism of Zimbabwe’s gover... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Bellingham scores twice to lift England past Haaland and Norway 2-1 and into World Cup semifinals
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla.— Jude Bellingham locked arms with teammate Harry Kane as England fans belted out the Beatles’ “Hey Jude.” Bellingham certainly earned the serenade. He scored twice on Saturday — an equalizer in the first half and the go-ahead goal in the third minute of extra time — to lift England past Norway 2-1 [...] The post Bellingham scores twice to lift England past Haaland and Norway 2-1 and into World Cup semifinals appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: MHEPO DZASIMUKA: Disaster as Drunk-Driving Chigodora Crashes into Zanu PF MP Honourable Dinha’s Car @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Justice Under Scrutiny: The Zvimba Drunk-Driving Incident Involving an MP Zvimba – A recent court ruling involving a Zvimba farmer, Zebediah Chigodora, and Zanu PF’s Zvimba East legislator, Honourable Mercy Dinha, has ignited a fervent public debate regarding the application of justice in Zimbabwe. Chigodora, a 42-year-old farmer, was convicted of negligent driving and driving [...] The post MHEPO DZASIMUKA: Disaster as Drunk-Driving Chigodora Crashes into Zanu PF MP Honourable Dinha’s Car first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Church, Government hold healing crusade in Guruve after Zvitsva murder spree @bulawayo24
item.description: GURUVE — The Saint John Apostolic Church of the WholeWorld, government leaders and thousands of congregants gathered in Guruve at the weekend for a spiritual intercession crusade aimed at bringing pea... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Mnangagwa blames ’small groups’ for SA’s anti-immigrant protests @bulawayo24
item.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa has described recent anti-immigrant protests in South Africa as the actions of "small groups", saying they do not represent the position of African governments, which rema... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: The Abandoned Mercedes Heist: Unravelling the Mystery of the US$23,600 Loot in Norton
item.description: NORTON – In the quiet, leafy suburb of Knowe Phase 1, the night is usually defined by the distant hum of the Harare-Bulawayo highway and the occasional bark of a guard dog. However, last Thursday, that silence was shattered by a violent intrusion that has left the local community grappling with the reality of an [...] The post The Abandoned Mercedes Heist: Unravelling the Mystery of the US$23,600 Loot in Norton first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News
